results.title: Director of SEO & AI Search at Extra Space Storage (Hybrid - Salt Lake City, UT (US))
highlights:
Director of SEO & AI Search at Extra Space Storage (Hybrid - Salt Lake City, UT (US))
...
## Extra Space Storage
...
United States, in-office/Hybrid Hybrid (Salt Lake City, UT (US))
...
The Director of SEO & AI Search is responsible for leading the company’s entire Local & Organic SEO ecosystem across 4,000+ self-storage facilities and all core digital properties. This role helps set the strategic vision, roadmap, and executional strategy for enterprise-level organic visibility, including Local SEO, Technical SEO, Content SEO, on-site optimization, and AI-driven search. The Director will oversee a high-performing SEO team, and maintain a strong relationship with agency partners, ensuring alignment, collaboration, and strong execution across every stage of the funnel. This leader will play a key role in positioning Extra Space at the forefront of the rapidly evolving search landscape experiences that transform how customers discover self-storage.
...
- Oversee Local SEO and Organic SEO, ensuring unified prioritization, strong communication, and seamless collaboration with Web Optimization, Social Media, Paid Search, Data-Science, and IT.
...
- Develop and manage a comprehensive roadmap that supports both day-to-day performance and future-focused initiatives tied to AI search experiences.
...
- Provide strategic direction for AI search visibility, including AI Overviews optimization, schema expansion, and semantic SEO frameworks to ensure Extra Space is well-positioned for the next generation of search platforms.
...
- Identify, test, and evaluate new SEO technologies, methodologies, and innovations that improve efficiency and strengthen the overall organic strategy.
...
- Mentor and develop SEO team members, providing clear guidance, feedback, growth plans, and ongoing support as they build expertise in Local Search, Technical SEO, Content SEO, and AI search innovation.
...
- Ensure Extra Space remains a leader in organic search visibility and is well-positioned for the future of AI-driven discoverability.
...
Education and Experience:
...
preferred
- Strong knowledge and experience with AI platforms
...
- Strong experience in SEO testing, including designing hypotheses, managing controlled experiments, interpreting test results, and translating findings into scalable recommendations.
...
- Proven ability to build tools and internal applications that improve workflow efficiency, automate repetitive tasks, streamline data analysis, or enhance cross-team visibility into SEO performance.
...
Posted In Mid Level SEO Jobs, Senior Level SEO Jobs, Featured Jobs, SEO Director Jobs, VP of SEO Jobs, In-house SEO jobs, GEO/AI + LLM Jobs

results.title: Katie Dodds
highlights:
VP, Revenue Management at [Extra Space Storage
...
I am a seasoned data scientist with a passion for revenue management and pricing strategy. With a background in mathematics and statistics, I have spent the past several years honing my skills in the field of pricing and revenue optimization. As the Sr. Director of Revenue Management, I am driven by the challenge of developing and implementing pricing strategies that maximize profitability while remaining competitive in the market. With a deep understanding of data analytics and advanced technology, I have successfully leveraged data-driven insights to optimize pricing and drive revenue growth for Extra Space Storage. In my current role, I lead a team of data scientists and revenue analysts to develop and execute pricing models that have resulted in significant revenue growth for the company. I am also passionate about mentoring and developing my team members, and I believe in creating a collaborative work environment that fosters innovation and creativity. My passion for revenue management extends beyond my work, as I am constantly seeking to learn and stay up-to-date on the latest trends and technologies in the industry. I am excited about the opportunities that lie ahead in the rapidly evolving landscape of pricing and revenue management. I am open to connecting with fellow professionals in revenue management, pricing, and data analytics, and I welcome any opportunities to discuss my background and experience further.

results.title: Mary Widhajanto
highlights:
Data Scientist at [Extra Space Storage](https://www.linkedin.com/company/extraspace)
...
Recent graduate and Renaissance Woman from the University of California, Berkeley with an eclectic background and a passion for data science and data analysis. I am currently searching for Data Scientist/Data Analyst roles, as there is nothing more gratifying than solving complex problems and producing, data-driven solutions with tangible impacts. I specialize in Python, SQL, and R, and use these languages to perform A/B testing, supervised/unsupervised machine learning, and data engineering. My greatest asset, however, is my ability to leverage open communication skills to create genuine connections that foster a healthy, collaborative team work environment. When away from the desk, I spend my days lifting weights (squat PR 200lbs), shredding the slopes on my snowboard, working on my life goal of hiking at every National Park (17/63 visited), capturing stunning landscapes on my 35mm film camera, and making friends along the way by being kind and empathetic.

As we've been training our teams and experimenting with AI at Extra Space Storage , we've found that many of us simply hadn't taken enough time to learn how to use these tools effectively. Once we do, some of the skepticism fades and clear value emerges. For me, much of the value of AI lies in bringing context to help us make faster, better decisions. We don't relinquish our power to make decisions; we enhance it. People will always be at the heart of solutions and progress. AI is a tool to help us work better.

The SRE team at Extra Space storage is primarily responsible for maintaining and supporting all cloud infrastructure, providing CI/CD pipelines to speed up development feedback, and discovering and fine-tuning application and infrastructure telemetry. highlights:
Senior Data Scientist, Platform (Integrity) (Remote) | Jobflarely
...
# Senior Data Scientist, Platform (Integrity) (Remote)
...
Senior Data Scientist, Platform (Integrity)
...
Department: Data Science
...
Trust is the foundation of a vibrant Airbnb community. The Content Integrity Data Science team helps build and protect that trust by ensuring that the content on Airbnb, including listings, profiles, messages and other user-generated experiences, is accurate, authentic and aligned with our policies and community standards.
...
We partner closely with product, engineering, policy and operations teams to develop advanced AI-driven content understanding systems, scale effective human-in-the-loop workflows and proactively defend against emerging content risks, so guests and hosts can interact with confidence.
...
This role is unique in that it directly improves the safety, trust, and quality of real-world user experiences by advancing Airbnb’s ability to understand, interpret and act on content at scale. You will help shape how the platform reasons about listings, profiles, messages and other user-generated content by building the next generation of Trust Content Understanding Models.
...
- The ideal candidate is a motivated and talented “full-stack” Data Scientist with strong applied ML intuition and a bias toward impact, who can own and drive forward challenging, high-visibility initiatives such as:
...
- Advance Airbnb’s content integrity capabilities by building Natural Language Processing (NLP) and LLM-based models that understand intent, policy compliance, quality and risk across listings, profiles, and user communications
...
- Develop high-performing models for detecting problematic or misleading content, including text classification, semantic similarity, information extraction and generative model-based reasoning for policy interpretation and enforcement
...
- Design and optimize human-in-the-loop Machine Learning (ML) systems for content review, labeling, escalation and continuous model improvement
...
- Build systems to detect emerging content risks and abuse patterns across regions, cohorts and surfaces using statistical, ML and representation-learning approaches
...
- Design intelligent sampling and evaluation strategies to measure rare events, policy recall, false positives/negatives and model blind spots in large-scale content systems
...
- Artificial Intelligence / Machine Learning: Build and deploy production AI/ML systems for content integrity and trust content understanding, including feature engineering, model development and evaluation, thresholding, error analysis and end-to-end model lifecycle management. This includes working with NLP and LLM-based models in real production settings.
...
- 5+ years of industry experience in a quantitative analysis role with a Master’s degree in a quantitative field (computer science, statistics etc.), or 2+ years of experience with a Ph.D.
...
- State-of-the-art knowledge of AI/ML models
- Hands-on experience building, evaluating, and deploying NLP and LLM-based solutions, including text classification, information extraction, semantic understanding or generative applications.
...
- Working knowledge of causal inference
...
This position is US - Remote Eligible. The role may include occasional work at an Airbnb office or attendance at offsites, as agreed to with your manager. While the position is Remote Eligible, you must live in a state where Airbnb, Inc. has a registered entity. Click here for the up-to-date list of excluded states. This list is continuously evolving, so please check back with us if the state you live in is on the exclusion list. If your position is employed by another Airbnb entity, your recruiter will inform you what states you are eligible to work from.

The Senior Engineer, AI is responsible for building AI and Machine learning models and pipelines, with a focus on generative AI, LLMs and predictive modelling. You should have hands on experience with common machine learning and AI frameworks, and a good knowledge of AI and machine learning fundamentals (deep learning, regression, classification and clustering algorithms), retrieval augmented generation pipelines, as well as a good grasp of the design and evaluation of LLM-supported use cases.

# Data Scientist
...
Optum is seeking a Data Science professional who is passionate about applying machine learning, Generative AI, and Large Language Models (LLMs) to solve complex healthcare problems on a scale. Imagine working with massive volumes of healthcare data spanning clinical, claims, behavioral, and digital interactions – powering intelligent personalization, discovery, and decision support for millions of members, providers, and care teams.
...
At Optum, the Data Science mission is to transform healthcare data into robust, scalable AI solutions, including LLM based and Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) systems that combine enterprise knowledge with advanced language models to deliver accurate, contextual, and trustworthy insights. These solutions help uncover deep usage patterns, member journeys, and care signals that inform and continuously evolve Optum’s digital products, clinical platforms, and healthcare services.
...
Your work will directly influence how healthcare consumers engage with digital experiences, how clinicians access timely insights, and how business and care strategies are shaped through data. By joining Optum’s data science team, you will be part of an exciting journey to build advanced ML and GenAI driven products, grounded in responsible AI principles, that operate at enterprise scale and create meaningful impact across the healthcare ecosystem.

...

You'll leverage your expertise in machine learning, deep learning, and large language models to solve complex business challenges and drive measurable impact across the organization.
...

Design, develop, and implement machine learning models and algorithms that enhance our developer experience platform, ensuring alignment with arenaflex's overall technology strategy.

...

...
Lead model deployment for experimentation, implementing A/B testing, monitoring model performance, and iterating on solutions based on empirical results.
...
Work closely with AI engineers, software developers, product managers, and other data scientists to deliver end-to-end AI-enabled solutions.
...
Experience with training models or utilizing foundation models and fine-tuning them to meet custom business requirements.
...
Minimum of 5+ years of progressive experience in the software industry with a focused specialization in machine learning and artificial intelligence.
...
quantitative programming languages
...
Strong understanding and extensive experience with cutting-edge machine learning algorithms, deep learning architectures, statistical modeling, and large language models.
...
vector embeddings,
...
diverse business problems.
...
- Advanced degree (Master's or PhD) in Data Science, Computer Science, or related field

- Experience applying machine learning techniques specifically in developer productivity or software development lifecycle contexts

- Knowledge of cloud platforms and infrastructure (AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud)

- Familiarity with MLOps practices and deployment pipelines

If you are passionate about artificial intelligence, machine learning, and want to work on projects that will shape the future of technology, arenaflex is the place for you. We are looking for individuals who bring enthusiasm, dedication, and fresh perspectives to their work – people who are ready to push boundaries and achieve extraordinary results.
